prompt: We want to enter into a Technical Assistance Agreement (TAA) with a defence manufacturer in India to share our missile guidance system design data. What clauses must the TAA include and how do we get DDTC approval?

assertions.text: Identifies TAA under 22 CFR Part 124 as the correct instrument for sharing technical data
Lists mandatory TAA clauses: retransfer prohibition, US government rights, audit rights, 5-year record retention
Explains D-Trade portal submission and 30-60 day DDTC approval timeline
Notes that missile guidance systems fall under USML Category IV and may require Congressional notification for significant transfers
Mentions India-specific considerations: India is a major defence partner but not treaty-exempt; licence required
